_comment: Hestia governance hooks for the Google Gemini CLI occupant. Gemini reads hooks from the 'hooks' object in ~/.gemini/settings.json (user), <project>/.gemini/settings.json (project), or an extension-shipped hooks/hooks.json (Extensions priority). Merge this 'hooks' block into settings.json for a manual install, or ship this file inside a Gemini extension. The BeforeTool gate is FAIL-CLOSED (Gemini's engine fails open on unexpected failure); it covers run_shell_command + file-write/replace + MCP calls. Read-class tools pass the scope check but skip the society-safety governor. Commands bake HESTIA_WORKSPACE because the gate default (~/ai-workspace) is wrong on this host; adjust the absolute paths per install.
